explanation: This command encodes a PowerShell command that modifies Defender preferences using Set-MpPreference. It is a valid test case for the Sigma rule since it matches the detection criteria for base64 encoded MpPreference cmdlets.
This command uses an encoded PowerShell command to set MpPreference. The encoding and use of Set-MpPreference align with the Sigma rule's detection logic for encoded MpPreference cmdlets.

This command encodes a PowerShell command that modifies Defender preferences using Add-MpPreference. It is a valid test case for the Sigma rule since it matches the detection criteria for base64 encoded MpPreference cmdlets.
This command uses an encoded PowerShell command to add MpPreference. The encoding and use of Add-MpPreference align with the Sigma rule's detection logic for encoded MpPreference cmdlets.
